docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON APR-09-2026 BY ZOOM GRANTED GRANTED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUO, YUNHUA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-13-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YUNHUA LUO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOMGOV. DEFENDANT FLIX BUS, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF'S GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCE IS EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
